title: Vendor Master Services Agreement
document_text: Master Services Agreement between Klavora Technologies, Inc. and Northwind Systems LLC. Effective date: 2026-01-20. The initial term is 12 months and renews automatically for successive 12-month terms unless either party gives 30 days written notice before renewal. Klavora will pay undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt. Northwind must maintain service availability of 99.5 percent monthly and provide critical incident response within 4 hours. Each party must protect the other party's confidential information and use it only to perform under this agreement. Klavora may terminate for material breach if the breach is not cured within 15 days after written notice. Northwind's aggregate liability is capped at fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim, except for confidentiality breaches and gross negligence. Missed service levels trigger service credits under the applicable statement of work.

renewal_terms: Initial 12-month term with automatic 12-month renewals unless either party gives 30 days written notice before renewal.
payment_terms: Klavora pays undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt.

key_obligations.obligation: Provide critical incident response within 4 hours.
key_obligations.deadline: within 4 hours of a critical incident

key_obligations.obligation: Protect the other party's confidential information and use it only to perform under the agreement.

liability_or_penalty_terms: Northwind's aggregate liability is capped at fees paid in the prior 12 months except for confidentiality breaches and gross negligence.
Missed service levels trigger service credits under the applicable statement of work.
termination_terms: Klavora may terminate for material breach if the breach is not cured within 15 days after written notice.
confidentiality_terms: Each party must protect the other party's confidential information and use it only to perform under the agreement.
risk_flags: Liability cap has carve-outs for confidentiality breaches and gross negligence.
action_items: Monitor monthly uptime and incident response performance.
Review SOW service-credit provisions against SLA misses.

summaries.executive_summary: This MSA establishes a one-year term with automatic renewals, 30-day invoice payment terms, uptime and incident-response commitments from the vendor, and a standard mutual confidentiality obligation. Risk is concentrated in missed renewal notices, SLA non-performance, and the liability-cap carve-outs.
summaries.action_summary: Set reminders for the 30-day non-renewal notice window, monitor vendor SLA metrics monthly, and confirm that service credits are applied when thresholds are missed. Legal and vendor-management teams should also track the 15-day cure process for any material breach.

title: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
document_text: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement between Klavora Technologies, Inc. and Apex Analytics Ltd. Effective date: 2026-02-10. Either party may disclose confidential information for the purpose of evaluating a potential commercial relationship. The receiving party must protect confidential information with at least reasonable care, restrict access to personnel with a need to know, and not disclose the information to third parties without written consent. Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after termination of the agreement. Either party may terminate this agreement with 10 days written notice. The agreement excludes information that becomes public without breach, was already known, or is independently developed. A breaching party may be subject to injunctive relief.

key_obligations.obligation: Protect confidential information with at least reasonable care.
Restrict access to personnel with a need to know.
Do not disclose confidential information to third parties without written consent.

liability_or_penalty_terms: A breaching party may be subject to injunctive relief.
termination_terms: Either party may terminate the agreement with 10 days written notice.
confidentiality_terms: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after termination.
Confidential information may be used only to evaluate a potential commercial relationship.
Public, previously known, and independently developed information is excluded.
risk_flags: Post-termination confidentiality survives for three years.
Injunctive relief is available for breach.
action_items: Track any approved third-party disclosures in writing.
Preserve evidence of confidentiality controls for the three-year survival period.

summaries.executive_summary: The NDA allows information sharing only to evaluate a potential business relationship and imposes standard receiving-party confidentiality duties. The most important controls are access restriction, written consent for third-party disclosure, and management of the three-year post-termination confidentiality tail.
summaries.action_summary: Keep disclosures limited to need-to-know staff, require written approval before any third-party sharing, and document how confidential information is protected. If the relationship ends, continue confidentiality handling for three years and preserve records supporting compliance.

title: Senior Engineer Employment Agreement
document_text: Employment Agreement between Klavora Technologies, Inc. and Jordan Hale. Effective date: 2026-03-01. Employment is at will and may be terminated by either party at any time, subject to applicable law. Base salary is 165000 USD annually, paid according to the company's regular payroll schedule. Jordan Hale must devote full working time and attention to company business, comply with all company policies, and return company property within 5 business days after separation. Jordan Hale must keep company confidential information secret during employment and indefinitely after employment ends, except as permitted by law. Any bonus is discretionary. Violation of confidentiality or property-return obligations may result in injunctive relief and recovery of damages.

payment_terms: Base salary is 165000 USD annually, paid on the company's regular payroll schedule.

key_obligations.obligation: Devote full working time and attention to company business.
Return company property within 5 business days after separation.

liability_or_penalty_terms: Violation of confidentiality or property-return obligations may result in injunctive relief and recovery of damages.
termination_terms: Employment is at will and may be terminated by either party at any time, subject to applicable law.
confidentiality_terms: Employee must keep company confidential information secret during employment and indefinitely after employment ends, except as permitted by law.
risk_flags: Property return has a short post-separation deadline.
At-will termination still requires compliance with applicable law.
action_items: Track post-separation property return within 5 business days.
Acknowledge ongoing confidentiality obligations in onboarding and offboarding records.

summaries.executive_summary: The agreement is an at-will employment arrangement with fixed salary, discretionary bonus treatment, standard policy-compliance obligations, a five-business-day property-return requirement, and indefinite confidentiality duties. Primary risk areas are offboarding compliance and confidentiality enforcement.
summaries.action_summary: Maintain onboarding evidence that policies were acknowledged, monitor offboarding to ensure all company property is returned within five business days, and preserve documentation of the employee's ongoing confidentiality obligations after separation.
